side_effects: Derris leucanthus, also known as the 'yellow derris', contains toxic compounds called rotenoids, which are used as insecticides and fish poisons. intro: Derris leucanthus, also known as the "Pitomba" or "Pitombeira", is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Fabaceae family.
